name: Verify GET root endpoint returns HTML content
validation: Status code is 200 and response content-type is text/html, and body contains <html> tag

name: Verify GET style.css returns CSS content
validation: Status code is 200 and body starts with CSS comment or valid CSS content

name: Verify GET mockend.svg returns valid SVG content
validation: Status code is 200 and response content contains <svg> tag

name: Verify GET png image returns binary PNG data
validation: Status code is 200 and body starts with PNG file signature bytes

name: Verify POST to google-analytics.com returns 204 no content
validation: Status code is 204 No Content and response body is empty

name: Verify GET ads API returns JSONP response
validation: Status code is 200 and body contains a valid JSONP callback wrapper

name: Verify POST to /cdn-cgi/rum returns 204 no content
validation: Status code is 204 No Content and response body is empty

name: Verify GET /posts/1 returns JSON post object
validation: Status code is 200 and response body is a JSON object containing userId, id, title, and body fields

name: Verify accessing non-existent endpoint returns 404
validation: Status code is 404 Not Found

name: Verify POST to GET-only endpoint returns 405 Method Not Allowed
validation: Status code is 405 or appropriate error response for incorrect method usage

name: Verify GET request with invalid query parameters returns 400 or ignores parameters
validation: Status code is 400 Bad Request or 200 with default response ignoring invalid params

name: Verify GET /posts/{non-numeric} returns 400 or 404
validation: Status code is 400 Bad Request or 404 Not Found when ID is invalid

name: Verify GET /posts/{999999} returns 404 for non-existent post
validation: Status code is 404 Not Found when resource ID does not exist

name: Verify GET with excessive query string length returns 414 or handled gracefully
validation: Status code is 414 URI Too Long or 200 with ignored extra parameters

name: Verify GET /posts/0 or negative ID returns 400 or 404
validation: Status code is 400 Bad Request or 404 Not Found for invalid ID values

name: Verify GET resources with very large numeric IDs
validation: Status code is 404 Not Found or proper error indicating resource doesn't exist

name: Verify responses do not expose sensitive headers like Server or X-Powered-By
validation: Sensitive server headers are not present in response headers

name: Verify no JSONP callback injection possible in ads API URL
validation: Callback parameter is sanitized and no executable JS injection in response body

name: Verify no injection possible with query parameters in /posts endpoint
validation: Input parameters are sanitized and response does not contain injected script

name: Verify CORS headers are present and correctly configured
validation: Correct Access-Control-Allow-Origin header present allowing expected domains

name: Verify HTTPS endpoints have valid SSL/TLS certificate
validation: SSL certificate is valid and trusted for all HTTPS URLs

name: Verify GET /posts/1 responds within acceptable time threshold
validation: Response time is less than 500ms under normal load

name: Verify GET root endpoint HTML page loads under 1 second
validation: Response time is under 1 second

name: Verify bulk GET requests to /posts endpoint handle concurrency gracefully
validation: System remains responsive and no significant failure when 100 concurrent requests are made

name: Verify static assets (style.css, svg, png) load quickly within 300ms
validation: Response time for static assets is consistently under 300ms

name: Verify POST endpoints (analytics, rum) handle requests correctly under burst traffic
validation: No errors or timeouts occur when 50 POST requests are fired in a short time
